candidates.why: Main operating top-line revenue; balancing item is an adjustment line with no values.
Balancing/plug line, not the primary revenue figure.

variables.notes: Petroleum Revenues clearly represents the company’s main operating revenue.
No COGS candidate was provided, but 'Production expenses' in the income statement is very likely the COGS equivalent. Manual review needed to add correct mapping.

candidates.why: This is income, not an operating expense; should not be treated as SG&A.
Explicit overhead/administrative expense; fits SG&A definition.
Operating overhead expenses not classified elsewhere; typical SG&A component.
Additional bucket of other operating expenses; fits SG&A if used.

variables.notes: Selected all expense-type overhead components and excluded the income line 'Other operating income' from SG&A.

candidates.why: Directly labeled R&D-related labor expenses; a clear R&D expense component.
Explicit R&D expense line; primary choice for XRD.
Balance sheet development asset, not a current-period R&D expense.
Gross development asset; not an expense line.

variables.notes: Both explicit R&D expense lines are included; development assets on the balance sheet are excluded as they are capitalized costs, not period expenses.

candidates.why: Primary income-statement interest expense line; best representation of XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; a component of financing costs but secondary to the main interest expense line.
Interest capitalized into assets, not expensed; should generally be excluded from XINT.
Represents non-controlling interests, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; duplicate informational line, not primary.
Debt balance sheet item; not an expense line.
Accrued but unpaid interest liability; not the expense line itself.
Debt balance; not interest expense.
Non-controlling equity interest; not interest expense.

variables.notes: Chose the main Interest Expenses line as XINT; excluded capitalized interest and balance-sheet debt items.

candidates.why: Tax item affecting equity, but not the total book equity balance itself.
Component of equity, not total equity.
Explicit total shareholders’ equity figure; best proxy for book equity.
Duplicate label of total equity; same concept as 'Total Equity'.
Balancing adjustment line; not the actual equity total.
Balancing line, not the substantive equity total.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for total L+E; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Selected the primary total equity line from the balance sheet as book equity.

candidates.why: Income-statement share attributable to non-controlling interests; can indicate MIB but preferred source is balance sheet if available.
Balance-sheet non-controlling interests; standard definition of MIB for equity share.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet Minority Interest as the MIB (non-controlling interests in equity).
